word.item: to dip (hide) in brains (a tanning process)
to draw (on cigarette or pipe) to smoke
I'm going to break the bottle
to light (of a fire, not tr.)
I'm going to string my bow
he's going to string his bow
she's going to string her bow
we're going to string our bow
they (2 m.) are going to string their bow
on either side, on both sides, on all sides

interlinear-text.item: illegible note at bottom of page (no pr???)

word.item: when it got there she came
I head him (I get ahead of him?)
when she came close to catch him
to chase her away he [wanted, intended, tried
they surrounded her/he placed around her
you are going to shoot and kill him
he lassoed it (hooked it with the rope)
If I pull him + throw him
it (the tree) he got down from (the tree)
she missed her breath when she fell
